headline: Equinor software advisor connected to developer practices, testing, and technical community building
title: Senior Advisor
confidenceNote: Public Equinor developer-conference and GitHub evidence matches Thorvald Johannessen to Equinor software work, but the current Senior Advisor title is only weakly corroborated by public sources.
bioMarkdown: Senior advisor at Equinor with public traces around software engineering practices, developer conferences, testing workshops, and Equinor open-source tooling.

primary.label: GitHub profile
primary.note: Public GitHub profile for Thorvald Johannessen shows activity around Equinor open-source repositories including segyio, ERT, and related engineering tools.

primary.label: Equinor EDC Software 2022 agenda
primary.note: Equinor internal developer conference agenda lists Thorvald Johannessen on the event day crew and includes a software-engineering-practices advisor bio reference.

secondary.label: Equinor EDC Software 2021 agenda
secondary.note: Conference agenda lists Thorvald Johannessen as responsible for a multi-day robocar workshop, supporting a developer-enablement profile.

secondary.label: OnePetro paper acknowledgement
secondary.note: Technical paper on machine-learning-assisted cement log interpretation acknowledges Thorvald Johannessen and cites Equinor dlisio tooling.

headline: Perth technology consultancy founder helping teams with Agile, DevOps, cloud, and software delivery
title: CEO / Founder
confidenceNote: Interfuze, LinkedIn, Business News, and company LinkedIn sources consistently identify Tim de Boer as an Interfuze director/founder in Perth with Agile and technical consulting experience.
bioMarkdown: Director and founder at Interfuze in Perth, advising organizations on Agile delivery, solution architecture, DevOps, cloud adoption, and custom software transformation.

primary.label: Interfuze about page
primary.note: Company page lists Tim de Boer as a director and describes his Agile, software, solution-delivery, leadership, and technical consulting background.

primary.label: Interfuze story page
primary.note: Company story says Tim de Boer was one of the developers who founded the Perth technology consultancy in 2019.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Public profile identifies Tim de Boer as Director at Interfuze Consulting in the Greater Perth Area.

secondary.label: Business News profile
secondary.note: Business News lists Tim de Boer as Director at Interfuze and summarizes his cross-industry IT, solution architecture, DevOps, data, and project-management experience.

secondary.label: Interfuze LinkedIn company page
secondary.note: Company LinkedIn page lists Tim de Boer among Interfuze Consulting employees and places the firm in Perth, Western Australia.

secondary.note: Public post connects Tim Garvin to a Westfield Insurance GenAI solution highlighted in an insurance claims article.

headline: Everpure technical leader working on AI infrastructure, storage telemetry, and agent performance

confidenceNote: LinkedIn, Everpure engineering blog authorship, and patent records connect Tim Brennan/Timothy Brennan to Everpure and storage-system technical work; public title evidence is limited.

secondary.label: Everpure blog author listing
secondary.note: Everpure blog index lists Tim Brennan among authors for technical Everpure Storage Copilot content.

secondary.label: Justia patent record
secondary.note: Patent listing names Timothy Brennan among inventors on Everpure-assigned virtual storage system work.

headline: CoinGecko cofounder and president building crypto market data and decentralized-finance intelligence
title: Cofounder
confidenceNote: CoinGecko, LinkedIn, GitHub, and multiple crypto-industry profiles consistently identify TM Lee as CoinGecko cofounder and current president; location evidence varies between Singapore and Malaysia.
bioMarkdown: Cofounder of CoinGecko, now president, focused on crypto market data, decentralized-finance intelligence, developer metrics, and products that make digital-asset markets easier to understand.

primary.label: CoinGecko leadership update
primary.note: CoinGecko announcement says cofounder TM Lee transitioned from CEO to President as Bobby Ong became CEO.

primary.label: CoinGecko author page
primary.note: CoinGecko author profile identifies TM Lee as the co-founder of CoinGecko and a Purdue CS graduate.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Public profile identifies TM Lee as Co-Founder & President at CoinGecko.

primary.label: GitHub profile
primary.note: Public GitHub profile says TM Lee is co-founder at CoinGecko and links to the CoinGecko organization.

secondary.label: CoinGecko careers page
secondary.note: Careers page introduces TM Lee as President and Bobby Ong as CEO, describing them as CoinGecko founders.

secondary.label: RootData profile
secondary.note: RootData lists TM Lee as co-founder and president of CoinGecko and notes Singapore-related blockchain research activity.

secondary.label: BeInCrypto profile
secondary.note: Profile summarizes TM Lee's CoinGecko cofounder background and crypto-market analysis work.
